creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:

    misc/bigboard/files  patch-bigboard-apps_directory.py

                         patch-bigboard-stocks-apps-appbrowser.py

                         patch-bigboard-stocks-self-SelfStock.py 
                         patch-main.py 
  Log:
  The Big Board sidebar is an experimental panel for the GNOME Desktop,
  designed to integrate with Online Desktop and Mugshot
  
  WWW:    http://live.gnome.org/OnlineDesktop/Sidebar
  
  PR:             ports/124196
  Submitted by:   Ashish Shukla <wahjava at gmail.com>
